matcher_value: $e=Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='System';StartTime=(Get-Date).AddDays(-30);Level=@(1,2,3)} -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.ProviderName -in @('Microsoft-Windows-WHEA-Logger','Microsoft-Windows-Kernel-Processor-Power') -or $_.Message -match '(?i)\bECC\b|uncorrectable|processor|cpu|offline' }; if($e){$e | Select-Object TimeCreated,ProviderName,Id,LevelDisplayName,@{N='Message';E={($_.Message -replace '\r?\n',' ')}} | Format-Table -Wrap -Auto}else{'No CPU/ECC/offline-like events found in the last 30 days.'}
